title: New Eva Mobile game
wikitext:
[]: New Eva Mobile game? Post by Vince » Sun Sep 29, 2013 1:36 am Hi guys, this is my first post and if it's true, I can't wait to play it! http://eva.bushimo.jp/ Edit: Moved to correct subforum. - Xard

[]: Post by Xard » Sun Sep 29, 2013 8:00 am Yeah it's definetly real. It came out ten days ago, actually.
